notes:
Game is startup with black screen, but in-game cursor is working: it has in-game view and changes color on click left or right mouse button. That's all. 

Choosing the others proton version (5.13-6; 6.3-8; 7.0-3; 6.1-GE-2; 6.21-GE-2) didn't help. Installing latest DXVK (by protontricks) didn't help too.
